item.name: Syldra Horn
item.description: A tar-stained horn that, when blown, emits a low, rumbling tone that can be heard even hundreds of yalms under the sea─the preferred breeding grounds of the legendary Syldra.

mount.name: Syldra
mount.action: Summon forth Syldra. Even in death, she would want to help.
mount.description:
Legends say there once lived a kindly sea dragon who befriended a pirate, and that their friendship knew no bounds. This is not that sea dragon; however, with a little time and caring, who is to say that a similar relationship cannot be forged?
※Sea dragons have no relation to actual dragons.
